  1. Home

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026

Information We Collect

RandomUSAddress.com does not collect any personal information from its users. We do not require registration or account creation.

Analytics

We use Cloudflare Analytics to collect anonymized usage data such as page views and visitor counts. This data cannot be used to identify individual users.

Cookies

We use minimal cookies necessary for the functioning of the website and Google AdSense. You can control cookie settings through your browser.

Third-Party Services

We use Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google may use cookies to serve relevant ads. Please refer to Google's privacy policy for more information.

Contact

If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at contact@randomusaddress.com.
